name: router-gate
description: LLM 裁决门：pass→done，fail→redo（节点级 custom：llm-router Command goto）

params.prompt: (s) => [new SystemMessage('评判，只输出 JSON：{"verdict":"pass"|"fail"}'), new HumanMessage(s.output)]
params.route: (parsed) => { const v = (parsed ?? {}) as { verdict?: string }; const verdict = v.verdict === 'fail' ? 'fail' : 'pass'; return { goto: verdict === 'fail' ? 'draft' : '__end__', update: { verdict } }; }
